title: A failure, documented: Perplexity API quota exhaustion and recovery
access_mode: server-side public-API calls from CFI.co infrastructure

timeline.failure_run: 2026-07-24T15:09:49Z — all 8 questions failed, HTTP 401 insufficient_quota (API credits exhausted)
timeline.recovery_run: 2026-07-24T15:23:36Z — credits restored; all 8 questions succeeded, 8/8 citing CFI.co

why_published: CFI.co commits to publishing unsuccessful tests rather than curating them away. A monitoring system that never shows a failure is not evidence of reliability; this case shows the failure mode, its cause, and the recovery — all archived.
maturity_note: This is a transparency/negative-result case, not a citation claim.
limitations: The failure was on CFI.co's side (test-account billing), not Perplexity's service
Error bodies are token-redacted as a credential-hygiene precaution
